parameters.command:
echo '{' && echo '"cpu_idle": '$(top -l 1 | grep 'CPU usage' | awk '{print $7}' | tr -d '%')',' && echo '"disk_usage_pct": '$(df -h / | tail -1 | awk '{print $5}' | tr -d '%')',' && echo '"memory_pressure": "'$(memory_pressure | head -1 | awk '{print $NF}')'",'
&& echo '"timestamp": "'$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)'"' && echo '}'
